creator: rumen.yotov@gmail.com
text:
Updating from or installing "shared-mime-info-1.0_1" and "shared-mime-info-1.0_2" fails while running 'gmake updating mime-database ...'.
Just before that thare're messages about missing library: libicui18n.48 which must be linked to /usr/local/lib/libglib_2.0.so.0 (part of glib).

Fix: 

Compile "glib" w/o the patch
How-To-Repeat: Compile glib with "fix-collation" patch and update/install shared-mime-info
